_readme: Per-set composition facts (session-6 generalization). Consumed by astrometrics.configure() for every product entry point (starcomb, starsep, bg_qa CLI, inspect_stage, judgment_crops, measure_stack). Values here are MEASUREMENTS of this framing, moved out of the scripts; edit only with numbers (NOTES.md).

corridor._note: MW band corridor, hand-measured on the L2 starless layer (session 4). Mode 'wcs' candidate VALIDATED session 6: |b|<=9.0deg gives IoU 0.776 vs this hand strip, gate verdict unchanged (PASS), and the overlay shows the derived band tracks the real MW course better (results/wcs_corridor_overlay_set-03.png). Stays 'manual' so the approved B7 render reproduces byte-exactly — switching to 'wcs' re-renders and needs user approval.
